zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Gramary於1325年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾比可頓時，她的父親Robert de Gramary25歲，母親Joan Harringwell21歲。她和Sir Thomas Middleton ,Knt,至少有3個兒子和4個女兒。她去世於1371年在英國維斯特莫藍德肯達爾享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Gramary于1325年出生在英国英格兰越可爾比可頓时，她的父亲Robert de Gramary25岁，母亲Joan Harringwell21岁。她和Sir Thomas Middleton ,Knt,至少有3个儿子和4个女儿。她去世于1371年在英国維斯特莫藍德肯達爾享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Gramary was born in 1325, in Bickerton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Robert de Gramary, was 25 and her mother, Joan Harringwell, was 21. She had at least 3 sons and 4 daughters with Sir Thomas Middleton ,Knt,. She died in 1371, in Kendal, Westmorland, England, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Gramary est née en 1325, à Bickerton, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert de Gramary, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Joan Harringwell, avait 21 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles avec Sir Thomas Middleton ,Knt,. Elle est décédée en 1371, à Kendal, Westmorland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Gramary 1325 in Bickerton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Gramary 25 und ihre Mutter Joan Harringwell 21. Sie hatte mit Sir Thomas Middleton ,Knt, mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1371 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Kendal, Westmorland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Gramary è nata il nel 1325 nel Bickerton, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Robert de Gramary, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Joan Harringwell, aveva 21 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie con Sir Thomas Middleton ,Knt,. Morì nel 1371, nel Kendal, Westmorland, England, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Gramaryが1325年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアビッカートンで生まれた時，父Robert de Gramaryは25歳，母Joan Harringwellは21歳であった。彼女はSir Thomas Middleton ,Knt,との間に少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1371年にイギリスウエストモーランドケンダルで46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Gramary(이)가 1325년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 바이커턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Gramary(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Harringwell(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 Sir Thomas Middleton ,Knt,(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1371년 영국 웨스트모를랜드 켄다에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Gramary родилась в 1325 г. в местности биккиртон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert de Gramary было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Harringwell, 21. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери от Sir Thomas Middleton ,Knt,. Она умерла в 1371 г. в местности кендаль, вестморланд, Англия в возрасте 46 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Gramary nació en 1325, en Bickerton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert de Gramary, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Joan Harringwell, tenía 21 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas con Sir Thomas Middleton ,Knt,. Murió en 1371, en Kendal, Westmorland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 46 años.
